subcodes.first_line: The world is ablaze with the Fire that hath manifested from the Lote-Tree of God's Command, the Lord of all worlds. By the life of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اشتعل العالم من النار التی ظهرت من سدره امر الله رب العالمین لعمر الله ان
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @living waters; water of life, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @Primal Will and the Word; Remembrance; Manifestation of God
